messages.content: What processor does the Amstrad PCW use?
The Amstrad PCW uses a Zilog Z80A processor running at 4 MHz.
Which CPU is used in the Amstrad PCW?
The Amstrad PCW uses a Zilog Z80A processor running at 4 MHz.
What microprocessor powers the PCW 8256?
The Amstrad PCW 8256 uses a Zilog Z80A processor running at 4 MHz.
What microprocessor powers the PCW 8512?
The Amstrad PCW 8512 uses a Zilog Z80A processor running at 4 MHz.
Is the Amstrad PCW an IBM PC compatible computer?
No. The Amstrad PCW is not IBM PC compatible. It uses a Zilog Z80A processor and CP/M Plus operating system.
What operating system does the Amstrad PCW use?
The Amstrad PCW uses CP/M Plus as its operating system.
What operating system runs on the Amstrad PCW?
The Amstrad PCW runs CP/M Plus as its operating system.
What word processing software runs on the Amstrad PCW?
The Amstrad PCW uses Locoscript word processing software.
What word processing software does the Amstrad PCW use?
The Amstrad PCW runs Locoscript word processing software.
What is Locoscript on the Amstrad PCW?
Locoscript is word processing software.
How much memory does the Amstrad PCW 8256 have?
The Amstrad PCW 8256 has 256 KB of memory.
How much memory does the Amstrad PCW 8512 have?
The Amstrad PCW 8512 has 512 KB of memory.
How much memory does the Amstrad PCW have?
Depending on the model, the Amstrad PCW may have 256 KB or 512 KB of memory.
When was the Amstrad PCW released?
The Amstrad PCW was released in September of 1985.
When was the Amstrad PCW 8256 released?
The Amstrad PCW 8256 was released in September of 1985.
When was the Amstrad PCW 8512 released?
The Amstrad PCW 8512 was released in September of 1985.
What year was the Amstrad PCW released?
The Amstrad PCW was released in 1985.
Does the Amstrad PCW support a mouse?
Yes, AMX MOUSE for Amstrad PCW 8256/8512 BY Advanced Memory Systems Ltd.
